name: OkamaOS
title: Relay Controls & Dev Tooling
summary: Argon2id wallet PIN hardening, parent wallet controls, Settings > Wallet PIN unlock overlay, Update History browser (dev mode), and Store URL gated to dev mode.
notes: Security: wallet passphrase now Argon2id-stretched (64 MB, t=2) when argon2-cffi is installed.
New: parent.conf WALLET_ENABLED and WALLET_DAILY_LIMIT_OKT controls via parent.py.
New: Settings > Wallet [A] opens PIN unlock overlay; fetches live ETH + OKT balances on confirm.
New (dev): Settings > Updates > Browse Update History — fetches feed.json, lists all versions, [A] to download.
Changed: Game Store 'Set Server URL' button now hidden unless dev mode is active (F10).
